quotes.text: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Silence is a source of great strength.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: The best fighter is never angry.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: He who knows others is wise. He who knows himself is enlightened.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Be content with what you have; rejoice in the way things are. When you realize there is nothing lacking, the whole world belongs to you.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: When you are content to be simply yourself and don't compare or compete, everyone will respect you.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Care about what other people think and you will always be their prisoner.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: If you are depressed, you are living in the past. If you are anxious, you are living in the future. If you are at peace, you are living in the present.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Simplicity, patience, compassion. These three are your greatest treasures.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: The wise man is one who knows what he does not know.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Life is a series of natural and spontaneous changes. Don't resist them; that only creates sorrow. Let reality be reality. Let things flow naturally forward in whatever way they like.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Water is the softest thing, yet it can penetrate mountains and earth. This shows clearly the principle of softness overcoming hardness.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Stop thinking, and end your problems.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Act without expectation.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: A leader is best when people barely know he exists. When his work is done, his aim fulfilled, they will say: we did it ourselves.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Watch your thoughts, they become your words. Watch your words, they become your actions. Watch your actions, they become your habits. Watch your habits, they become your character. Watch your character, it becomes your destiny.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: The flame that burns twice as bright burns half as long.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: To the mind that is still, the whole universe surrenders.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: He who controls others may be powerful, but he who has mastered himself is mightier still.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Music in the soul can be heard by the universe.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: New beginnings are often disguised as painful endings.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Do the difficult things while they are easy and do the great things while they are small.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: The truth is not always beautiful, nor beautiful words the truth.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: At the center of your being you have the answer; you know who you are and you know what you want.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Time is a created thing. To say 'I don't have time' is like saying 'I don't want to.'
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: In dwelling, live close to the ground. In thinking, keep to the simple. In conflict, be fair and generous. In governing, don't try to control. In work, do what you enjoy. In family life, be completely present.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: If you would take, you must first give. This is the beginning of intelligence.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Those who flow as life flows know they need no other force.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu
